Notes: Drop possibly due to new labs entering market

Positive_Tests_Suspected_AGS: Higher in males (42% pos vs 24% female), older adults (peak >70 yrs 44.6% pos). Geographic: predominantly southern, midwestern, mid-Atlantic US (lone star tick range); high counties e.g. Suffolk NY, Bedford VA, Charlotte VA (high per capita). Some clusters MN/WI.

Actual affected: up to 450000 people in US may have AGS (CDC estimate). Not nationally notifiable; data from one major lab mostly. Some states (e.g. WV, VA, AR etc.) have mandatory reporting but numbers limited publicly.
Suspected if positive alpha-gal sIgE >=0.1 kU/L from commercial lab tests. Residence-based (zip/county). Not confirmed clinical cases.
